sys_atf_step.description: Answer the questions on the form as follows: Location = and Select workspace = and Start date/time = and End date/time = and Additional comments = {{Reusable Inputs.comments}} and Purpose of visit = {{Reusable Inputs.purpose of visit}} and Reserved for =

sys_variable_value.value: IO:11c28e1a83bd83d41902ba96feaad34d={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_location.location}}^IO:65e0b116833d83d41902ba96feaad351={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_workspace.workspace_name}}^IO:d490c61683bd83d41902ba96feaad370=javascript:(function(){var d=new Date(); var h=d.getHours(); var m=d.getMinutes(); var ampm=h>=12?'PM':'AM'; h=h%12; h=h?h:12; return ('0'+(d.getMonth()+1)).slice(-2)+'-'+('0'+d.getDate()).slice(-2)+'-'+d.getFullYear()+' '+h+':'+('0'+m).slice(-2)+' '+ampm;})()^IO:d5f1ca9e837d83d41902ba96feaad3b4=javascript:(function(){var d=new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate()+1); var h=d.getHours(); var m=d.getMinutes(); var ampm=h>=12?'PM':'AM'; h=h%12; h=h?h:12; return ('0'+(d.getMonth()+1)).slice(-2)+'-'+('0'+d.getDate()).slice(-2)+'-'+d.getFullYear()+' '+h+':'+('0'+m).slice(-2)+' '+ampm;})()^IO:2e3a8e5683fd83d41902ba96feaad366={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_comments}}^IO:9793c69a83bd83d41902ba96feaad3b2={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_purpose_of_visit}}^IO:9e136d1a83b983d41902ba96feaad3de={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_reserved_for.name}}^EQ

sys_element_mapping.value: IO:11c28e1a83bd83d41902ba96feaad34d={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_location.location}}^IO:65e0b116833d83d41902ba96feaad351={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_workspace.workspace_name}}^IO:d490c61683bd83d41902ba96feaad370=javascript:(function(){var d=new Date(); var h=d.getHours(); var m=d.getMinutes(); var ampm=h>=12?'PM':'AM'; h=h%12; h=h?h:12; return ('0'+(d.getMonth()+1)).slice(-2)+'-'+('0'+d.getDate()).slice(-2)+'-'+d.getFullYear()+' '+h+':'+('0'+m).slice(-2)+' '+ampm;})()^IO:d5f1ca9e837d83d41902ba96feaad3b4=javascript:(function(){var d=new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate()+1); var h=d.getHours(); var m=d.getMinutes(); var ampm=h>=12?'PM':'AM'; h=h%12; h=h?h:12; return ('0'+(d.getMonth()+1)).slice(-2)+'-'+('0'+d.getDate()).slice(-2)+'-'+d.getFullYear()+' '+h+':'+('0'+m).slice(-2)+' '+ampm;})()^IO:2e3a8e5683fd83d41902ba96feaad366={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_comments}}^IO:9793c69a83bd83d41902ba96feaad3b2={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_purpose_of_visit}}^IO:9e136d1a83b983d41902ba96feaad3de={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_reserved_for.name}}^EQ

sys_update_version.name: sys_atf_step_f31b10e2830647501902ba96feaad30d
sys_update_version.payload:
trueAnswer the questions on the form as follows: Location = and Select workspace = and Start date/time = and End date/time = and Additional comments = {{Reusable Inputs.comments}} and Purpose of visit = {{Reusable Inputs.purpose of visit}} and Reserved for = Set Variable Values (SP)22e4229b48703030070870cf888cb0b5csys_atf_stepadmin2026-07-15 19:45:32f31b10e2830647501902ba96feaad30d13Set Variable Values (SP)ae0e640883f103941902ba96feaad302ae0e640883f103941902ba96feaad302sys_atf_step_f31b10e2830647501902ba96feaad30dadmin2026-07-16 04:34:569201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1sys_atf_stepf31b10e2830647501902ba96feaad30d100sys_variable_valueadmin2026-07-15 19:45:32271c1466830647501902ba96feaad35d0admin2026-07-15 19:45:321a31ed1683b983d41902ba96feaad37fd164adb48703030070870cf888cb0b30sys_atf_stepf31b10e2830647501902ba96feaad30d150sys_variable_valueadmin2026-07-15 19:45:32ab1c1466830647501902ba96feaad35c0admin2026-07-15 19:45:322fba49d673142300688e0d573cf6a748sys_atf_stepf31b10e2830647501902ba96feaad30d200sys_variable_valueadmin2026-07-15 19:45:32ef1c1466830647501902ba96feaad35c13admin2026-07-16 04:34:56IO:11c28e1a83bd83d41902ba96feaad34d={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_location.location}}^IO:65e0b116833d83d41902ba96feaad351={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_workspace.workspace_name}}^IO:d490c61683bd83d41902ba96feaad370=javascript:(function(){var d=new Date(); var h=d.getHours(); var m=d.getMinutes(); var ampm=h>=12?'PM':'AM'; h=h%12; h=h?h:12; return ('0'+(d.getMonth()+1)).slice(-2)+'-'+('0'+d.getDate()).slice(-2)+'-'+d.getFullYear()+' '+h+':'+('0'+m).slice(-2)+' '+ampm;})()^IO:d5f1ca9e837d83d41902ba96feaad3b4=javascript:(function(){var d=new Date(); d.setDate(d.getDate()+1); var h=d.getHours(); var m=d.getMinutes(); var ampm=h>=12?'PM':'AM'; h=h%12; h=h?h:12; return ('0'+(d.getMonth()+1)).slice(-2)+'-'+('0'+d.getDate()).slice(-2)+'-'+d.getFullYear()+' '+h+':'+('0'+m).slice(-2)+' '+ampm;})()^IO:2e3a8e5683fd83d41902ba96feaad366={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_comments}}^IO:9793c69a83bd83d41902ba96feaad3b2={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_purpose_of_visit}}^IO:9e136d1a83b983d41902ba96feaad3de={{callable_input['9201c46e830247501902ba96feaad3f1'].u_reserved_for.name}}^EQ3f3525f48703030070870cf888cb0b37variable_valuesf31b10e2830647501902ba96feaad30dadmin2026-07-15 19:45:32e71c1466830647501902ba96feaad35c12admin2026-07-16 04:34:56
